mapper.select: select id, subid, name, status, source, created_by, created_by_name, promo_link, bound_at from agent_subid where created_by = #{createdBy} order by id desc

select s.id, s.subid, s.name, s.status, s.source, s.created_by, s.created_by_name, s.promo_link, s.bound_at from agent_subid s join agent_client a on a.sys_user_id = s.created_by where a.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} order by s.id desc
select count(1) from agent_subid where created_by = #{createdBy} and lower(subid) = lower(#{subid})
